title: libanotis ugoensis var. japonica
intro: Libanotis ugoensis var. japonica, also known as Japanese mountain centaury, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It is a perennial herb that is native to Japan and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and gastrointestinal disorders, due to its expectorant and diuretic properties. Libanotis ugoensis var. japonica can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Japanese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
